one_liner: PLANTED: expedited SNF request with the 72-hour clock already breached

service.description: Skilled nursing facility admission, 14 days requested (expedited)

clinical_summary: 77F post fall with pelvic fracture, discharged from acute care 2026-07-06, awaiting SNF placement in a hospital bed. Therapy evaluation documents daily skilled PT/OT need for weight-bearing progression and transfer training; physician certifies daily skilled need. Provider marked the request expedited because the member is occupying an acute bed pending decision.

draft_decision.rationale: Daily skilled therapy need documented; certification on file.
